chunks.text: High-Q Strong Coupling Capacitive-Gap Transduced RF Micromechanical Resonators (EECS-2020-6) by Alper Ozgurluk. Non-Linear Stiffness Extraction & Modeling of Wineglass Disk Resonators (EECS-2018-183) by Alain Anton. Parametric Oscillation with Wineglass Disk Resonators (EECS-2018-179) by Thanh-Phong Nguyen.

Hollow Disk Electromechanical Coupling Cx/Co Boosting (EECS-2018-60) by Yafei Li and Clark Nguyen. FEA-Assisted Analysis and Gain Optimization of a Micromechanical Resonant Displacement Amplifier (EECS-2017-207) by Gleb Melnikov. A Micromechanical Frequency-Selective Power Amplifier (EECS-2017-171) by Clark Nguyen and Wei-chang Li.
Transistor circuits for MEMS based transceiver (EECS-2015-150) by Clark Nguyen and Soumya Mantha. High-Q Low-Impedance MEMS Resonators (EECS-2012-218) by Li-Wen Hung and Clark Nguyen.
